title: Add Ant Pest Types (Black, Red, Army, Carpenter) With Educational Content + Icons

requirements.text: Add four new ant educational content components for: Black Ants, Red Ants, Army Ants (interpret user text "arm ants" as "army ants"), and Carpenter Ants. Each component must use clear, user-facing English text and follow the existing pest content layout patterns (cards + alerts) to cover: (1) basic identification cues and common signs, (2) where they are commonly found and what attracts them, (3) prevention steps, and (4) what to do if found (safe clean-up/control steps, monitoring, and when to call a professional). Include a prominent safety note about stings/allergic reactions where relevant, and include a prominent structural-damage caution for Carpenter Ants.

quotes: black ants and red ants arm ants and carpenter ants

acceptanceCriteria: New React components exist under frontend/src/components/pests/ for all four ant types and are exportable (consistent with other *Content.tsx components).
Each ant component includes sections for identification, habitats/attractants, prevention, and what to do if found, written in English.
Carpenter Ants content includes a clear warning about potential wood/structural damage and advises when to contact a licensed professional.
Content includes a safety note about stings and seeking medical care for severe reactions/allergies (as appropriate) without claiming medical diagnosis.

requirements.text: Integrate Black Ants, Red Ants, Army Ants, and Carpenter Ants into the pest selection UI in frontend/src/components/EducationalContent.tsx across the Identify, Habitats, Prevention, and Treatment tabs, consistent with the existing pattern (selection buttons + conditional rendering via renderPestContent).

quotes: black ants and red ants arm ants and carpenter ants

acceptanceCriteria: EducationalContent.tsx includes the four new ant pests in the selectedPest state union/type and updates the default/rendering logic accordingly.
The pest selection grid includes buttons for each new ant type with clear labels in English.
Selecting each new ant type renders the correct corresponding ant content component in Identify/Habitats/Prevention/Treatment tabs (and bedbugs behavior remains unchanged).

requirements.text: Add static icon image assets for Black Ants, Red Ants, Army Ants, and Carpenter Ants under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the pest selection controls via tags with appropriate alt text, consistent with existing pest icon usage (e.g., cockroach/head-lice/spider icons).

quotes: black ants and red ants arm ants and carpenter ants

acceptanceCriteria: Four icon files are present under frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filenames specified in the image requirements.
The new pest selection buttons use the new icons via and include appropriate alt text for accessibility.
Icons render correctly at the same size and style as the existing pest icons in the selection grid.

constraints: Frontend must not modify any paths listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Keep all user-facing text in English.
Do not route static icons through the backend; icons must be served as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated.
Respect the existing EducationalContent.tsx pest selection pattern (buttons + renderPestContent switch).
nonGoals: Do not add AI/ML or automated identification for ants.
Do not add new backend APIs or backend schema changes for ant content as part of this request.
Do not change existing Bed Bugs quiz/guide section types or content retrieval behavior.

required: Simple black ant icon illustration, clean line style, transparent background (black-ant-icon.dim_128x128.png, 128x128)
Simple red ant icon illustration, clean line style, transparent background (red-ant-icon.dim_128x128.png, 128x128)
Simple army ant icon illustration, clean line style, transparent background (army-ant-icon.dim_128x128.png, 128x128)
Simple carpenter ant icon illustration, clean line style, transparent background (carpenter-ant-icon.dim_128x128.png, 128x128)
